title: Add a retry, timeout, and cost budget
description: Wrap a model call with classified error handling, bounded backoff, a timeout, and an enforced token/cost ceiling.
body: Steps: 1. Classify provider errors into retryable (429, 5xx, timeout) and terminal (4xx). 2. Set a per-call timeout that aborts the request. 3. Cap retries with exponential backoff plus jitter. 4. Compute the request's max token/cost and reject if it exceeds the ceiling. 5. Emit a metric for latency, retries, and cost per call. Rollback point: before raising any ceiling. Validation: a forced timeout aborts, a 4xx does not retry, and a request over the ceiling is refused before sending.
